de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class SMTSolverImplementation

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SMTSolverImplementation
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SMTSolver, Runnable

    final class SMTSolverImplementation
extends Object
implements SMTSolver, Runnable

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SMTSolver

        SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption, SMTSolver.SolverState

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Throwable exception
      If there was an exception while executing the solver it is stored in this attribute
      private Collection<Throwable> exceptionsForTacletTranslation 
      private int ID 
      private static int IDCounter 
      private SolverListener listener
      It is possible that a solver has a listener.
      private ReentrantLock lockInterruptionVariable
      This lock variable is responsible for the attribute reasonOfInterruption
      private ReentrantLock lockStateVariable
      This lock variable is responsible for the state variable sovlerState
      private SMTProblem problem
      The SMT problem that is related to this solver
      private String problemString
      Stores the translation of the problem that is associated with this solver
      private ProblemTypeInformation problemTypeInformation
      This holds information relevant for retrieving information on a model from an SMT instance.
      private ExternalProcessLauncher<SolverCommunication> processLauncher
      starts a external process and returns the result
      private ModelExtractor query 
      private SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reasonOfInterruption 
      private Services services
      The services object is stored in order to have the possibility to access it in every method
      private SMTSettings smtSettings
      Strores the settings that are used for the execution.
      private AbstractSolverSocket socket 
      private SolverCommunication solverCommunication
      The record of the communication between KeY and the given solver.
      private SMTSolver.SolverState solverState 
      private SolverTimeout solverTimeout
      The timeout that is associated with this solver.
      private TacletSetTranslation tacletTranslation
      Stores the taclet translation that is associated with this solver.
      private Thread thread
      The thread that is associated with this solver.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Throwable getException()
      If there has occurred an exception while executing the solver process, the method returns this exceptions, otherwise null
      Collection<Throwable> getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation()
      Returns the exceptions that has been thrown while translating taclets into assumptions.
      SMTSolverResult getFinalResult()
      Returns the result of the execution.
      SMTProblem getProblem()
      Returns the SMT Problem that is connected to this solver process.
      ModelExtractor getQuery() 
      SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption getReasonOfInterruption()
      Returns the reason of the interruption: see ReasonOfInterruption.
      AbstractSolverSocket getSocket() 
      String getSolverOutput()
      Returns the solver output without any change.
      long getStartTime()
      Returns the system time when the solver was started.
      SMTSolver.SolverState getState()
      Returns the current state of the solver.
      TacletSetTranslation getTacletTranslation()
      Returns the taclet translation that is used as assumptions.
      long getTimeout()
      Returns the amount of milliseconds after a timeout occurs.
      String getTranslation()
      Returns the translation of the SMTProblem that is handed over to the solver process.
      SolverType getType()
      Returns the type of the solver process.
      private static String indent(String string) 
      void interrupt(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reason)
      Use this method in order to interrupt a running solver process.
      private void interruptionOccurred(Throwable e) 
      boolean isRunning()
      Returns true if the solver process is running else false.
      String name()
      Returns the name of the solver.

      void setReasonOfInterruption(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reasonOfInterruption) 
      private void setReasonOfInterruption(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reasonOfInterruption, Throwable exc) 
      private void setSolverState(SMTSolver.SolverState value)

      Starts a solver process.
      String toString() 
      private String[] translateToCommand(Term term) 
      boolean wasInterrupted()
      Returns true if the solver process was interrupted by an user, an exception or a timeout.

      • IDCounter

        private static int IDCounter

      • ID

        private final int ID

      • socket

        private AbstractSolverSocket socket

      • query

        private ModelExtractor query

      • problem

        private SMTProblem problem
        The SMT problem that is related to this solver

      • listener

        private SolverListener listener
        It is possible that a solver has a listener.

      • processLauncher

        private ExternalProcessLauncher<SolverCommunication> processLauncher
        starts a external process and returns the result

      • services

        private Services services
        The services object is stored in order to have the possibility to access it in every method

      • solverCommunication

        private SolverCommunication solverCommunication
        The record of the communication between KeY and the given solver. If everything works fine, it also contains the final result.

      • problemTypeInformation

        private ProblemTypeInformation problemTypeInformation
        This holds information relevant for retrieving information on a model from an SMT instance. null in the beginning, is created at translation time.

      • lockStateVariable

        private ReentrantLock lockStateVariable
        This lock variable is responsible for the state variable sovlerState

      • lockInterruptionVariable

        private ReentrantLock lockInterruptionVariable
        This lock variable is responsible for the attribute reasonOfInterruption

      • thread

        private Thread thread
        The thread that is associated with this solver.

      • solverTimeout

        private SolverTimeout solverTimeout
        The timeout that is associated with this solver. Represents the timertask that is started when the solver is started.

      • reasonOfInterruption

        private SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reasonOfInterruption

      • solverState

        private SMTSolver.SolverState solverState

      • type

        private final SolverType type

      • smtSettings

        private SMTSettings smtSettings
        Strores the settings that are used for the execution.

      • problemString

        private String problemString
        Stores the translation of the problem that is associated with this solver

      • tacletTranslation

        private TacletSetTranslation tacletTranslation
        Stores the taclet translation that is associated with this solver.

      • exception

        private Throwable exception
        If there was an exception while executing the solver it is stored in this attribute

    • Method Detail

      • getQuery

        public ModelExtractor getQuery()

      • setQuery

        public void setQuery(ModelExtractor query)

      • start

        public void start(SolverTimeout timeout,
                  SMTSettings settings)
        Starts a solver process. This method should be accessed only by an instance of SolverLauncher. If you want to start a solver please have a look at SolverLauncher.
        Parameters:
        timeout -
        settings -

      • getReasonOfInterruption

        public SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption getReasonOfInterruption()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the reason of the interruption: see ReasonOfInterruption.
        Specified by:
        getReasonOfInterruption in interface SMTSolver

      • getException

        public Throwable getException()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        If there has occurred an exception while executing the solver process, the method returns this exceptions, otherwise null
        Specified by:
        getException in interface SMTSolver

      • getProblem

        public SMTProblem getProblem()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the SMT Problem that is connected to this solver process. If the solver process is still running the method returns null in order to maintain thread safety.
        Specified by:
        getProblem in interface SMTSolver

      • setReasonOfInterruption

        public void setReasonOfInterruption(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reasonOfInterruption)

      • setReasonOfInterruption

        private void setReasonOfInterruption(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reasonOfInterruption,
                                     Throwable exc)

      • getType

        public SolverType getType()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the type of the solver process.
        Specified by:
        getType in interface SMTSolver

      • getStartTime

        public long getStartTime()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the system time when the solver was started. (in ms)
        Specified by:
        getStartTime in interface SMTSolver

      • getTimeout

        public long getTimeout()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the amount of milliseconds after a timeout occurs. (in ms)
        Specified by:
        getTimeout in interface SMTSolver

      • getState

        public SMTSolver.SolverState getState()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the current state of the solver. Possible values are
        Waiting<\code>: The solver process is waiting for the start signal
        Running<\code>: The solver process is running Stopped<\code>: The solver process was stopped. The reason can be a user interruption, an exception, a timeout or a successfull run.
        Specified by:
        getState in interface SMTSolver

      • setSolverState

        private void setSolverState(SMTSolver.SolverState value)

      • wasInterrupted

        public boolean wasInterrupted()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns true if the solver process was interrupted by an user, an exception or a timeout. In all other cases (including that the solver is still running) the method returns true.
        Specified by:
        wasInterrupted in interface SMTSolver

      • isRunning

        public boolean isRunning()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns true if the solver process is running else false.
        Specified by:
        isRunning in interface SMTSolver

      • run

        public void run()
        Specified by:
        run in interface Runnable

      • interruptionOccurred

        private void interruptionOccurred(Throwable e)

      • name

        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the name of the solver.
        Specified by:
        name in interface SMTSolver

      • indent

        private static String indent(String string)

      • translateToCommand

        private String[] translateToCommand(Term term)
                             throws IllegalFormulaException,
                                    IOException
        Throws:
        IllegalFormulaException
        IOException

      • interrupt

        public void interrupt(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reason)
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Use this method in order to interrupt a running solver process.
        Specified by:
        interrupt in interface SMTSolver
        Parameters:
        reason - The reason of interruption. Can only be set to ReasonOfInterruption.Timeout or ReasonOfInterruption.User other wise a IllegalArgumentException is thrown.

      • getFinalResult

        public SMTSolverResult getFinalResult()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the result of the execution. If the solver process is still running the method returns a result object that represents the result 'unknown'.
        Specified by:
        getFinalResult in interface SMTSolver

      • getTacletTranslation

        public TacletSetTranslation getTacletTranslation()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the taclet translation that is used as assumptions. If the solver process is still running the method returns null in order to maintain thread safety.
        Specified by:
        getTacletTranslation in interface SMTSolver

      • getTranslation

        public String getTranslation()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the translation of the SMTProblem that is handed over to the solver process. If the solver process is still running the method returns null in order to maintain thread safety.
        Specified by:
        getTranslation in interface SMTSolver
        Returns:
        String representation of the corresponding problem, if the solver process is not running, otherwise null.

      • toString

        public String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class Object

      • getSolverOutput

        public String getSolverOutput()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the solver output without any change. The format is: " Normal Output: ... Error Output: ... Exit Code: ... "
        Specified by:
        getSolverOutput in interface SMTSolver

      • getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation

        public Collection<Throwable> getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation()
        Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
        Returns the exceptions that has been thrown while translating taclets into assumptions.
        Specified by:
        getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation in interface SMTSolver
